mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in the unemployment rate signals tightening labor markets that boost corporate earnings visibility, generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE declines by >2% over 3 months.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent growth in consumer spending (RSAFS) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong demand-side momentum that drives equity valuations higher over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Interaction term between RSAFS and HOUST shows negative coefficient in 60d return regressions (p > 0.05) across 3-year rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) combined with declining capacity utilization signals overcapacity correction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 1% in 1 month AND CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: 20d returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO and CPIAUCSL both rise by specified thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: A 20-day moving average crossover of the federal funds rate above 4% signals a monetary tightening regime that depresses equity multiples, producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX generates positive 60d returns in > 50% of periods when FEDFUNDS exceeds 4%.

mechanism_narrative: A deceleration in payroll growth (PAYEMS) below 100k signals weakening labor market dynamics that reduce corporate profit visibility, leading to negative S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS growth falls below 100k.

mechanism_narrative: A contraction in GDP (GDPC1) combined with rising consumer prices (CPIAUCSL) indicates stagflationary pressures that drive equity market volatility and negative returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: GDPC1 declines > 1% in 6 months AND CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: 20d returns are positive in > 50% of instances where GDPC1 declines and CPIAUCSL rises by specified thresholds.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production (INDPRO) alongside declining capacity utilization signals overcapacity correction, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO rises > 1% in 1 month AND CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: 20d returns are positive in > 50% of instances where INDPRO and CPIAUCSL both rise by specified thresholds.
